name: penumbra-spec
description: Cross-platform plausible-deniability spec — tooling for validation and linting

scripts.validate: ajv validate -s schemas/manifest.schema.json -d "examples/*.json" && ajv validate -s schemas/decoy-content.schema.json -d "conformance/test-vectors/03-decoy/*.json"
scripts.ci: npm run validate && npm run lint && npm run xref
